description: A series of mistakes led to this position in a game where I played black. I was very pleased with myself when I found the marked point, thinking I'd managed to win the fight... After the game, I came back to the position, and realized to my horror that if w had found the right first move and continuation, I would have lost horribly. My first move should have been elsewhere, and after this blunder, I should have resigned. Can you see why?
